inputs.label: Success Probability
inputs.businessContext: Probability of success per attempt (0 to 1). Must be > 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability of success per attempt (0 to 1). Must be > 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her denemede başarı olasılığı (0 ile 1 arası). > 0 olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erfolgswahrscheinlichkeit pro Versuch (0 bis 1). Muss > 0 sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité de succès par tentative (0 à 1). Doit être > 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad de éxito por intento (0 a 1). Debe ser > 0.

inputs.label: Cost per Attempt
inputs.businessContext: Cost of each pull in in-game currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of each pull in in-game currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oyun içi para biriminde her çekmenin maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten jedes Ziehvorgangs in der Spielwährung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de chaque tirage en monnaie du jeu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de cada extracción en la moneda del juego.

inputs.label: Guarantee Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive failures after which next pull is guaranteed success. 0 means no guarantee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of consecutive failures after which next pull is guaranteed success. 0 means no guarantee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir sonraki çekmenin garantili başarı olduğu ardışık başarısızlık sayısı. 0 garanti olmadığı anlamına gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl aufeinanderfolgender Fehlschläge, nach denen der nächste Zug garantiert erfolgreich ist. 0 bedeutet keine Garantie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'échecs consécutifs après lequel le prochain tirage est garanti réussi. 0 signifie aucune garantie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de fallos consecutivos tras los cuales la siguiente extracción es un éxito garantizado. 0 significa sin garantía.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
